titleStmt.title: SII 7.913: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 913. (A.R. No. 284 of 1902). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmevu vaḷar tirupponmātu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalamperitu ciṟappa vicaiyamāmakaḷ velpuyat tiruppa Icaiyincelvi Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar van=ti ṟaiñca niṇila maṭantaiyait tiru
maṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷar taruman maṇimuṭi kavittena tirumuṭi cūṭi mallaiñālattu palluyiṟ kellām Ellaiyi linpam Iyalvinil Iyal veṇkuṭai niḻaṟkiḻ ceṅko locci vāḻi pallūḻi Āḻi naṭappa
cempon vīrasiṁ hāsana ttu pu(vana)vaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=ta- ruḷiya kovirā jakecaripaṟmarāṉa tribhuvana ccakra varttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade varkku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu malāṭākiya jana
nātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu tirukkovalūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyār koyilil tiruppaḷḷiyaṟaiāḷuṭaiyāḷukku tirunāyaṟṟukkiḻamai toṟum puṟampe Eḻuntaruḷi tiruvolakkañce
ytu Amutuceytaruḷukaikku AriciThe word arici is expressed by a symbol.irutūṇip patakkukkum maṟṟum veṇṭuvanattukku peṇṇainativāṇaṉ marakkālāl I Irukalaney tūṇip patakkukkum kiḷiyūr malaiyamān malaiyan malaiya(n)nāna kulottuṅkacoḻacce
tiyarāyan veṇṭikkoḷḷa Ivvāḷuṭaiyāḷukku Ivvūr sabhai yom tānampaṇṇina nilamāvatu citārinilattukkuk kiḻakku cāraikkālil kiḻpoki vāykkālukku vaṭakku taṭi 6- nāl kuḻi 1000 10 1va- m Ikkā
lukku teṟku taṭi 4- nāl kuḻi 6 100 3 10 8- m kiḻpoki vāykkāl kuḻi 10 1- m Itde var devatā nam cāṭṭumukkālukku kiḻakku Ālañcey taṭi 2- nāl kuḻi 7 100 2 10- m cākkiyan taṭi 1- nāl kuḻi 3 100 2 10- m
nakarattā n=ta ṭi 1- nāl kuḻi 3 100- m Ākak kuḻi muvāyirattāl nilam Onṟarai veliyum Ivvūr sabhai yārai veṇṭikkoḷḷa Inni man=ta m celvatāka Ikkoyil civa- brāha ṇar(p)pakkal viṭṭom
Ivvūr sabhai yom Itu panmā heśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 7.913 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
